scripts.test:i18n-routing: tsc --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target es2022 --outDir .tmp/i18n-tests --rootDir src/shared/i18n --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck src/shared/i18n/locale.ts src/shared/i18n/localeLinks.ts src/shared/i18n/seo.ts src/shared/i18n/pathMapping.test.ts src/shared/i18n/seo.test.ts && node --test .tmp/i18n-tests/pathMapping.test.js .tmp/i18n-tests/seo.test.js && node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('.tmp/i18n-tests',{ recursive: true, force: true })"
